tasks.label: Set Vercel env vars
tasks.command: cd /d "c:\Users\Administrator\Documents\GitHub\Tai_Lieu_Hay" && powershell -NoProfile -Command "$v = Get-Content -Raw 'D:\Tải xuống\gen-lang-client-0197484920-firebase-adminsdk-fbsvc-603b1e316c.json' | ConvertFrom-Json | ConvertTo-Json -Compress; Set-Content -Path 'firebase_sa.json' -Value $v; Get-Content -Raw 'firebase_sa.json' | npx --yes vercel env add FIREBASE_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_KEY production --project tailieu-hay --scope tailieuhay-s-projects --yes; npx --yes vercel env add FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID production --value 'gen-lang-client-0197484920' --project tailieu-hay --scope tailieuhay-s-projects --yes; npx --yes vercel env add APP_URL production --value 'https://tailieu-hay.vercel.app' --project tailieu-hay --scope tailieuhay-s-projects --yes; npx --yes vercel env add BACKEND_DEBUG production --value 'false' --project tailieu-hay --scope tailieuhay-s-projects --yes"
